channel.title: API Reference on Meritum
channel.description: Recent content in API Reference on Meritum

item.title: SerializerInterface
item.description:
SerializerInterface#

Meritum\Serialization\SerializerInterface

Transforms a single domain object into an array<string, mixed>. Passed to Item or Collection at construction time to define how each record in that resource is serialized.

Methods#

/** @return array<string, mixed> */
public function serialize(mixed $data): array;

Receives the raw data object and returns its array representation. For collections, this is called once per element.

Example#

use Meritum\Serialization\SerializerInterface;

final class UserSerializer implements SerializerInterface
{
    public function serialize(mixed $data): array
    {
        return [
            'id'         => $data->id,
            'name'       => $data->name,
            'email'      => $data->email,
            'created_at' => $data->createdAt->format('c'),
        ];
    }
}

item.title: FormatterInterface
item.description:
FormatterInterface#

Meritum\Serialization\FormatterInterface

Converts an Item or Collection resource into an EnvelopeInterface using the configured StrategyInterface . Registered by SerializationModule as FormatterInterface::class.

Methods#

public function format(ResourceInterface $resource): EnvelopeInterface;

Dispatches to the strategy’s item() or collection() method based on the resource type. Throws InvalidArgumentException if the resource is neither an ItemInterface nor a CollectionInterface.

Example#

use Meritum\Serialization\Resource\Item;
use Meritum\Serialization\FormatterInterface;

final class ShowUserHandler implements RequestHandlerInterface
{
    public function __construct(
        private readonly FormatterInterface $formatter,
        private readonly UserSerializer $serializer,
        private readonly UserRepository $users
    ) {}

    public function handle(ServerRequestInterface $request): ResponseInterface
    {
        $user = $this->users->find($request->getAttribute('id'));

        $envelope = $this->formatter->format(new Item($user, $this->serializer));

        return new JsonResponse($envelope);
    }
}

item.title: Item
item.description:
Item#

Meritum\Serialization\Resource\Item

Wraps a single domain object alongside a SerializerInterface . Implements ItemInterface.

Constructor#

public function __construct(mixed $data, SerializerInterface $serializer)

$data is the raw domain object passed to $serializer->serialize() when the formatter processes the item.

Meta#

public function addMeta(string $key, mixed $value): static;
public function getMeta(): array;

Attaches arbitrary metadata. addMeta() is fluent. Non-empty meta appears as a meta key in the envelope.

Example#

use Meritum\Serialization\Resource\Item;

$resource = new Item($user, $this->serializer);
$resource->addMeta('generated_at', date('c'));

$envelope = $this->formatter->format($resource);

item.title: Collection
item.description:
Collection#

Meritum\Serialization\Resource\Collection

Wraps an iterable of domain objects alongside a SerializerInterface . Implements CollectionInterface. Supports cursor-based and offset-based pagination.

Constructor#

/** @param iterable<mixed> $data */
public function __construct(iterable $data, SerializerInterface $serializer)

The serializer is called once per element in $data when the formatter builds the collection.

Pagination#

public function setCursor(CursorInterface $cursor): static;

Attaches cursor pagination. Clears any previously set paginator. Produces limit, previous, and next keys in the envelope.

public function setPaginator(PaginatorInterface $paginator): static;

Attaches offset pagination. Clears any previously set cursor. Produces total, count, limit, current, and last keys in the envelope.

item.title: EnvelopeInterface
item.description:
EnvelopeInterface#

Meritum\Serialization\EnvelopeInterface

The formatted output returned by FormatterInterface::format(). Implements \JsonSerializable, so it can be passed directly to a JSON response.

Methods#

/** @return array<mixed> */
public function toArray(): array;

Returns the formatted data as an array. Pass this to your response object.

Example#

$envelope = $this->formatter->format($resource);

// Pass directly — EnvelopeInterface implements JsonSerializable
return new JsonResponse($envelope);

// toArray() is available if you need the raw array
$data = $envelope->toArray();

item.title: CursorInterface
item.description:
CursorInterface#

Meritum\Serialization\Pagination\CursorInterface

Provides cursor-based pagination metadata to a Collection . Implement this interface and call Collection::setCursor().

Methods#

public function getPrevious(): ?string;

The cursor token for the previous page, or null if this is the first page.

public function getNext(): ?string;

The cursor token for the next page, or null if this is the last page.

public function getPerPage(): int;

The number of items per page.

Output keys#

When a cursor is attached to a collection, these keys appear in the envelope alongside data:

item.title: PaginatorInterface
item.description:
PaginatorInterface#

Meritum\Serialization\Pagination\PaginatorInterface

Provides offset-based pagination metadata to a Collection . Implement this interface and call Collection::setPaginator().

Methods#

public function getCurrentPage(): int;
public function getLastPage(): int;
public function getTotal(): int;
public function getCount(): int;
public function getPerPage(): int;

Output keys#

When a paginator is attached to a collection, these keys appear in the envelope alongside data:

Key Source
total getTotal()
count getCount()
limit getPerPage()
current getCurrentPage()
last getLastPage()

Example#

use Meritum\Serialization\Pagination\PaginatorInterface;

final class UserPaginator implements PaginatorInterface
{
    public function __construct(
        private readonly int $total,
        private readonly int $count,
        private readonly int $perPage,
        private readonly int $currentPage,
        private readonly int $lastPage
    ) {}

    public function getTotal(): int       { return $this->total; }
    public function getCount(): int       { return $this->count; }
    public function getPerPage(): int     { return $this->perPage; }
    public function getCurrentPage(): int { return $this->currentPage; }
    public function getLastPage(): int    { return $this->lastPage; }
}

$resource = new Collection($users, $serializer);
$resource->setPaginator(new UserPaginator(
    total: 143,
    count: 25,
    perPage: 25,
    currentPage: 2,
    lastPage: 6
));

item.title: StrategyInterface
item.description:
StrategyInterface#

Meritum\Serialization\Strategy\StrategyInterface

Controls the output shape of the EnvelopeInterface produced by the formatter. Two implementations are provided; register a custom one as StrategyInterface::class to override.

Methods#

public function item(ItemInterface $item): EnvelopeInterface;
public function collection(CollectionInterface $collection): EnvelopeInterface;

Built-in implementations#

DataArrayStrategy (default)#

Meritum\Serialization\Strategy\DataArrayStrategy

Items: serialized fields wrapped in a "data" key.

{ "data": { "id": 1, "name": "Jane" } }

Collections: serialized items in a "data" array, pagination keys at root, optional "meta".

{ "total": 50, "limit": 25, "current": 1, "last": 2, "data": [...] }

ArrayStrategy#

Meritum\Serialization\Strategy\ArrayStrategy

Items: serialized fields at the root level. Meta appears as a "meta" key at root if set.
